description: Injected overlay runtime for element/fallback annotation, bounded metadata capture, layered source hints, and safe payload submission.

userStories.title: Build overlay shell and annotation mode controls
userStories.description: As a user, I want a small reversible overlay so that I can turn annotation mode on and off without breaking page interaction.
acceptanceCriteria: Add injected overlay shell with active/inactive mode, visible control, stop control, and isolated/prefixed styling
Inactive mode does not block normal page clicks or typing
Stop control removes or disables overlay listeners where possible
Browser verification passes
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Implemented in overlay runtime/source-hints batch; validated with typecheck, focused tests, and worker CDP browser verification.

userStories.title: Implement element hover click and note submission
userStories.description: As a user, I want hover outlines and click-to-annotate so that I can mark the exact element I mean.
acceptanceCriteria: Active mode shows a hover outline for visible element targets
Clicking a target opens note entry with submit and cancel controls
Submitting posts a normalized annotation payload tied to the binding token/config
Cancel returns to annotation mode without creating a record
Browser verification passes
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Implemented in overlay runtime/source-hints batch; validated with typecheck, focused tests, and worker CDP browser verification.

userStories.title: Capture target metadata and selector fallbacks
userStories.description: As an agent, I want multiple target identity signals so that I can find the affected UI even when one selector is brittle.
acceptanceCriteria: Capture best selector, DOM path, full DOM path where useful, tag name, class summary, text snippet, selected text when applicable, HTML opening-tag hint, accessibility hints, bounding box, viewport, URL, and title
Selector generation prefers stable ids and attributes before nth-of-type fallback
Missing selector or source data does not prevent annotation creation
Payload fields are capped before submission
Browser verification passes
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Implemented in overlay runtime/source-hints batch; validated with typecheck, focused tests, and worker CDP browser verification.

userStories.title: Capture layered source hints
userStories.description: As an agent, I want source hints when available so that I can locate the likely component or file quickly.
acceptanceCriteria: Capture explicit pibo/test/locator attributes as high-confidence source or stable-id hints
Capture LocatorJS-compatible metadata when present after verifying the available metadata shape
Capture React/Fiber or JSX dev metadata best-effort as medium-confidence hints when available
Store DOM fallback source hints with low confidence when no richer hint exists
Missing source hints are represented as absent or low-confidence fallback, not as errors
Browser verification passes
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Implemented in overlay runtime/source-hints batch; validated with typecheck, focused tests, and worker CDP browser verification.

userStories.title: Implement pin or region fallback annotation
userStories.description: As a user, I want a non-element fallback so that I can mark visual issues where no DOM element is enough.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement at least one fallback target kind: pin coordinates, drag region, or visual region
Fallback annotations store target kind, note, URL, viewport, position or bounding box, and optional screenshot artifact reference if available
Fallback flow works when element selection is not appropriate
Browser verification passes
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Implemented in overlay runtime/source-hints batch; validated with typecheck, focused tests, and worker CDP browser verification.

userStories.title: Add overlay throttling bounds and sanitization checks
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want overlay capture to be bounded and safe so that annotation mode does not leak or slow the page.
acceptanceCriteria: Throttle hover/target discovery and disable it when annotation mode is inactive
Apply client-side caps for note, text snippets, HTML hints, class summary, accessibility, and source raw metadata before submission
Escape overlay-rendered text and avoid executing page-derived strings
Add checks for oversized text, missing selector fallback, Shadow DOM best-effort where practical, and cross-origin iframe unavailable state
Browser verification passes
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Implemented in overlay runtime/source-hints batch; validated with typecheck, focused tests, and worker CDP browser verification.
